product_name: Beaded Bracelets for Women - Silver and Gold Boho Bracelets, Trendy Jewelry Gifts for Lover, Mom, Fr

caption.full_text: ad23r2 the camera view suddenly changes The video opens with an overhead static shot of a black and silver-colored beaded bracelet, featuring round black beads interspersed with flat silver disc beads, a silver-toned lobster clasp, and an extender chain. The bracelet is neatly displayed on a light pink rectangular box, which rests on a dark, textured background.
